challenge_summary: Storage account allows public blob access; missing diagnostic settings on Key Vault; SQL admin auth not Entra-only.
compact_for_parent: Pass 1 (security-governance) | MEDIUM | 1 must_fix, 2 should_fix | Key: [Storage public blob]; [KV diagnostics]; [SQL Entra-only]

issues.title: Storage account allows public blob access
issues.failure_scenario: Azure Policy Deny will block deployment.
issues.suggested_mitigation: Set allowBlobPublicAccess: false on all storage accounts.

issues.title: Key Vault missing diagnostic settings
issues.failure_scenario: Loss of audit visibility for secrets access.
